title: How can i reauest 3rd party with api?
excerpt:
Hi, 

I migrated my monday with the app “Tracket - timesheet”. 
i added some time logs and now i want to send a request via postman to see it. 
how can i do it?
how can i make a board from this 3rd app? 
thanks!

posts.author: shay.butran (shay butran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

  1. I migrated my monday with the app “Tracket - timesheet”.
    i added some time logs and now i want to send a request via postman to see it.
    how can i do it?
  2. how can i make a board from this 3rd app?
    thanks!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @shay.butran,

I am not sure I understand what you mean. What are you trying to do exactly via API?

And how is the third-party app “Tracket-Timesheet” related to what you want to do?

Looking forward to hearing from you

Cheers,
Matias
